key_insights.insight: Dealmaking doesn't need to be a zero-sum game; structuring deals where both buyer and seller can benefit leads to successful acquisitions.
key_insights.quote: There's plenty of ways to make sure it's a win-win...the truth of deal making that people forget about is that it is one of the very few things where it's never a zero-sum game.

key_insights.insight: Finance is made artificially complex to create a moat around the industry, but understanding basic balance sheets and P&L statements is key to business acquisition.
key_insights.quote: We just make it sound complex in finance because financial lingo is like the moat around how we make money, right? The less people speak our language, the more we can charge them, which is the secret.

key_insights.insight: It's easier to find people already predisposed to wanting what you offer than to try to persuade someone otherwise.
key_insights.quote: I truly believe that sales is a fallacy. I don't think sales exists. I think you find people who are already predisposed to want what you are quote unquote selling.

key_insights.insight: Many small business owners are willing to sell, even if profitable, due to burnout or a desire to retire, creating opportunities for acquisition.
key_insights.quote: At a certain point, you don't even want to continue with a profitable business. And this is where people get it so wrong.

key_insights.insight: A key to buying a business is to understand what a motivated seller truly wants and to become the solution to their needs.
key_insights.quote: How can you become the solution to what that avatar is looking for? How can you become the son to the father? How can you become the buyer to a really anxious seller? And then you can get your deal done.

key_insights.insight: Small businesses are gateways into understanding bigger business and can always be resold for profit.
key_insights.quote: You start with a small business that probably isn't the greatest business for you to own long term, but businesses are like real estate. You can turn around and sell them after you get in the game.

key_insights.insight: By using seller financing, it is possible to buy a business without any upfront capital.
key_insights.quote: I've bought many, many, many businesses for $0.

actionable_advice.advice: Leverage your existing expenses to identify potential business acquisitions.
actionable_advice.how_to: Review your personal and business P&L to identify services or products you regularly pay for, then explore acquiring or taking a percentage stake in those providers.

actionable_advice.advice: Seek out sellers who are approaching retirement or looking for a change.
actionable_advice.how_to: Ask business owners about their long-term plans and look for signs of readiness for a next adventure to capitalize on motivation.

actionable_advice.advice: Structure deals where the seller finances the acquisition.
actionable_advice.how_to: Offer to pay the seller over time using a percentage of the business's profits, deferring their tax burden and providing them with a steady income stream.

actionable_advice.advice: Use Reddit or similar online platforms to find experts in the industry you're seeking to buy into.
actionable_advice.how_to: Engage with people on Reddit and offer to pay for an hour of their time to ask them questions and get advice.

memorable_stories: The story of buying a laundromat from elderly owners looking to retire after decades of running the business.
The speaker tells a story about his Uncle Eb who had a small business that he ended up closing because he did not know his business was sellable
contrarian_claims: Competence in the industry isn't essential for buying a small business; understanding deals is more important.
Sales is a fallacy and it's about finding people who already want what you're selling.
Small businesses that aren't the greatest to own long-term are good starting points.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Moment 137: Finance Isn’t Rocket Science! The 2 Simple Skills Billionaires Use Everyday: Codie Sanchez
